claimText: Gene-Drive Technology (GDT) is a genetic engineering technique that alters normal Mendelian inheritance.
evidenceExcerpt: It is a genetic engineering technique that modifies genes to alter normal Mendelian inheritance
examUse: Statement-based question on the fundamental mechanism of Gene-Drive Technology.
distractorHooks: GDT strictly follows Mendelian inheritance principles
GDT is a traditional selective breeding method rather than genetic engineering

claimText: Gene-Drive Technology increases the likelihood that a specific suite of genes will be passed onto the next generation.
evidenceExcerpt: increasing the likelihood that a particular suite of genes will be passed onto the next generation.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the outcome of applying GDT in a population.
distractorHooks: GDT decreases the likelihood of specific genes being inherited
GDT ensures random distribution of genes in the next generation

claimText: Gene-Drive Technology can be utilized to stop insects from spreading vector-borne diseases and to control agricultural pests.
evidenceExcerpt: GDT can stop insects from spreading vector-borne diseases like mosquitoes and agricultural pests.
examUse: Application-based question on the potential uses of Gene-Drive Technology in public health and agriculture.
distractorHooks: GDT is exclusively used for human gene therapy
GDT cannot be applied to agricultural pests
